basic_details.job_title: Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Peon, Job Trainee and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Temporary Assistant Professor/ Temporary Research associate, Temporary Peon and More

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: All Posts: No age limit specified.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks in Microbiology or equivalent, NET/SLET/SET qualified or Ph.D. degree. OR Ph.D. from a foreign university ranked among top 500.
qualification.details: Temporary Assistant Professor/ Temporary Research associate in Microbiology (HPP): Master's degree with 55% marks in Microbiology or equivalent, NET/SLET/SET qualified or Ph.D. degree. OR Ph.D. from a foreign university ranked among top 500. Temporary Assistant Professor/ Temporary Research associate in Biotechnology (HPP): Master's degree with 55% marks in Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biochemistry or equivalent, NET/SLET/SET qualified or Ph.D. degree. OR Ph.D. from a foreign university ranked among top 500. Temporary Lab Assistant cum Storekeeper (Microbiology/Biotechnology HPP): B.Sc. Microbiology/Biotechnology with two years of experience OR M.Sc. Microbiology/Biotechnology. Job Trainee (Temporary) (Microbiology/Biotechnology HPP): Any graduate with computer proficiency. Temporary Peon (Microbiology/Biotechnology HPP): 10th Pass.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Temporary Assistant Professor/ Temporary Research associate in Microbiology (HPP)
Temporary Assistant Professor/ Temporary Research associate in Biotechnology (HPP)
Temporary Lab Assistant cum Storekeeper (Microbiology/Biotechnology HPP)

salary_details.details: Temporary Assistant Professor/ Temporary Research associate in Microbiology (HPP): Rs. 45,000/- Consolidated Temporary Assistant Professor/ Temporary Research associate in Biotechnology (HPP): Rs. 45,000/- Consolidated Temporary Lab Assistant cum Storekeeper (Microbiology/Biotechnology HPP): Rs. 18,000/- per month consolidated Job Trainee (Temporary) (Microbiology/Biotechnology HPP): Rs. 18,000/- per month consolidated Temporary Peon (Microbiology/Biotechnology HPP): Rs. 13,000/- per month consolidated

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Gujarat University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Gujarat University Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Gujarat University recruitment is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned department before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Temporary Assistant Professor/Research Associate posts?
faq.answer: For these posts, candidates need a Master's degree with 55% marks in Microbiology or Biotechnology/Biochemistry, along with NET/SLET/SET qualification or a Ph.D. degree. A Ph.D. from a top-ranked foreign university is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Gujarat University has announced a total of 9 vacancies across various temporary positions, including Assistant Professor/Research Associate, Lab Assistant, Job Trainee, and Peon.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application process for these temporary positions?
faq.answer: The application process involves sending your resume and required documents via email to the specified address. Detailed instructions are provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Temporary Assistant Professor/Research Associate positions?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Temporary Assistant Professor/Research Associate positions at Gujarat University is Rs. 45,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age limit for the recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limit for the mentioned temporary positions.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: All the positions announced in this recruitment drive are temporary in nature.

faq.question: Q8. Which email address should be used for application submission?
faq.answer: The application should be sent to [email protected]. Please ensure the correct email address is used.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any specific experience requirements for the Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Temporary Lab Assistant cum Storekeeper position, candidates with a B.Sc. in Microbiology/Biotechnology require two years of relevant experience. M.Sc. holders do not need prior experience.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the comprehensive details about the recruitment.
